final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: editorial illustration, cinematic concept art
Asset type: wide establishing shot for sci-fi film or game environment
Primary request: crowded neon-lit street in Neo-Tokyo 2077, deep depth of field from street vendor to distant skyscrapers
Scene/backdrop: narrow congested alleyway, dense multilingual neon signage (Japanese, Chinese, English), wet pavement with reflections, smog-obscured megatowers in distance, drones and floating holographic ads overhead
Subject: diverse cyberpunk crowd including women in traditional kimono with high-tech prosthetics, augmented workers in worn industrial gear, holographic virtual idols performing mid-air
Style/medium: digital painting, Blade Runner 2049 aesthetic, dense detail, cinematic concept art
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, extreme depth of field, foreground street vendor to vanishing point skyscrapers
Lighting/mood: artificial neon glow (pink, cyan-blue, orange-yellow) illuminating night scene like daylight, wet surface reflections, atmospheric haze, futuristic yet dystopian mood
Color palette: saturated pink + electric cyan-blue + warm orange-yellow + deep shadows + neon reflections on wet ground
Materials/textures: wet asphalt with mirror reflections, weathered metal surfaces, glowing neon tubes, holographic projections, synthetic fabrics, chrome prosthetics
Constraints: preserve the deep depth of field from foreground to distant skyline, maintain the multicultural crowd diversity, keep the wet pavement mirror effect
Avoid: clean utopian aesthetic, empty streets, flat lighting, deformed anatomy, low-detail background
